case_title: STEVEN ADAIR MACDONALD VS. CENK GURKOK

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,996.04 FILED BY MACDONALD, STEVEN ADAIR AS TO DEFENDANT GURKOK, CENK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-02-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-02-2010 - JUDGMENT. SUMMER BENAVIDES APPEARS ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
